entries.text: I want to build something that genuinely helps people see themselves more clearly.
Financial stability feels far away right now, but I notice that worrying about it drains energy I could use to create.
I feel most alive when I'm in deep conversation with someone who's genuinely curious.
Sleep has been inconsistent. Everything feels harder when I'm running on empty.
I want to be recognised for the depth of my thinking, not just the surface outputs.
